chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI C.P. No. S – 1075 of 2023 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES 1. For orders on office objection 2. For hearing of MA No. 7878/2023 3. For hearing of main case 27-11-2023 Mr. Hamid Idrees, Advocate for petitioner. Ms. Naushaba Haq Solangi, Assistant advocate General a/w SIP Agha Madad Ali Kha PS Gulberg. ====================== The crime record of the applicant, Naveed Shaukat Mughal, has been provided to his counsel. Learned counsel further submits that the police are unnecessarily harassing the applicant at the behest of his former wife and her new husband. Police officials are directed to act strictly in accordance with the law and not become party to any dispute that the applicant may have with his former wife. As far as the applicant's prayer that no case should be registered against him without the court's permission, under the case's circumstances, that is an unreasonable request and is therefore dismissed. The petition stands disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE
